title: lamium album subsp. turkestanicum
intro: Lamium album subsp. turkestanicum, also known as Turkistan white deadnettle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. Lamium album subsp. turkestanicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
